display.name: Host Metrics (k8s)
display.description: This dashboard uses the system metrics collected from the `hostmetrics` receiver to show CPU, Memory, Disk, Network and Filesystem usage

spec.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s.cluster.name') AS `k8s.cluster.name` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.node.cpu.time' GROUP BY `k8s.cluster.name`

SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s.node.name') AS `k8s.node.name` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.node.cpu.time' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'k8s.cluster.name') = $k8s.cluster.name GROUP BY `k8s.node.name`

display.name: Queue size
display.description: The queue size of pending I/O operations.
